text: I'm really curious if you have any plans for offering a self-hosted version down the line. It feels like there are a lot of us out there who would prefer that option, right? Just wanted to know if there's hope for us in the future or if it's strictly cloud-based forever.
Hey, I was wondering if you guys have a way to track shipments? Like, do I need to sign in or something? Thanks!
I would like to request a refund for my recent order. Please advise on the next steps.
I can't log in, it keeps saying my account doesn't exist, but I signed up yesterday.
I bought a game, but it won't start. Can I get a refund even though it was on sale? My cat also knocked over my coffee while I was trying to fix it.
can't access my profle, says wrong email... need help to fix this

I'm really upset that I can't log into my account. I changed my password twice, and it's still not working. The last time I was on, I had so many important messages. It's like I lost everything! Why is this happening? I just want to get back in and see my stuff.

I am very disappointed with my recent order. I received the package, but it was missing a crucial item that I had specifically ordered. This has caused significant inconvenience, and I expected better from your service. Please address this issue promptly.

I have encountered a frustrating issue with my recent order. The product arrived significantly delayed, and I was counting on it for an important event. While I appreciate the challenges of logistics, I would expect better communication regarding delays. This has caused quite a disruption for me, and I hope you can address this complaint promptly.
I was promised a refund a week ago, but I'm still waiting. What's going on?
I cant belive I got charged for a year when I only wanted the monthly plan! Please help me with this.
I need my money back for the last order, something went wrong.

I am encountering a persistent problem while using the application, wherein it fails to respond when I attempt to upload files exceeding the 5MB limit. Additionally, I have noticed that the interface becomes unresponsive under these circumstances, which is inconvenient. I have attached the relevant logs for your review.

I am writing to formally request a refund for a charge that was made to my account for an annual subscription, which I believed to be enrolling in a monthly plan instead. Could you please assist me in correcting this issue?
I received the wrong item and I'm really upset about it. Can I get a refund?

I am very disappointed with the service I received during my last interaction. It took an excessively long time to resolve my issue, and I felt that the representative did not seem genuinely interested in helping me. This is not the standard I expect from your company, and I hope you can address this matter seriously.
